description_long: A classic hamburger sits atop a white ceramic plate with a black rim, accompanied by a small serving of golden French fries. The hamburger features a lightly browned sesame seed bun, with visible layers of fresh green lettuce, a thick beef patty, and a slice of tomato peeking out from the side. The top bun is domed and sprinkled with sesame seeds, while the bottom bun is slightly compressed under the weight of the fillings. The lettuce is crisp and ruffled, providing a vibrant contrast to the darker patty and the soft, pale bun. The French fries are scattered to one side of the plate, varying in length and color from pale yellow to golden brown. The overall presentation is appetizing and typical of a casual dining or fast-food meal.
description: A sesame seed hamburger with lettuce, tomato, and a beef patty sits on a white plate with French fries. The bun is golden brown and the fries are scattered beside the burger.
description_view_0: The hamburger is centered on the plate with a few fries visible behind it, showing the lettuce and a hint of tomato beneath the top bun.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the hamburger, with the lettuce leaf prominently sticking out and a cluster of fries to the right.
description_view_2: The hamburger is seen with the fries more fully displayed in front, and the patty and lettuce are clearly visible under the bun.
description_view_3: The back of the hamburger is shown, with the fries mostly to the left and the lettuce and patty peeking out from the bun.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is layered directly beneath the top bun, with tomato and possibly onions beneath the lettuce, and the beef patty at the center. The toppings are unevenly distributed, with some ingredients protruding from the sides.
